module.name: Search
module.param:
| tstats prestats=t count WHERE `custom_index` GROUPBY origIpAddr, destIpAddr, origDeviceName, destDeviceName, globalCallID_callId, globalCallID_callManagerId, globalCallId_ClusterID
| stats count by origIpAddr, destIpAddr, origDeviceName, destDeviceName, globalCallID_callId, globalCallID_callManagerId, globalCallId_ClusterID | eval globalCallID_callManagerId=globalCallId_ClusterID + "::" + globalCallID_callManagerId | `get_call_id` | eval ip=mvappend(origIpAddr,destIpAddr) | eval device=mvappend(origDeviceName,destDeviceName) | stats dc(call_id) as calls dc(device) as devices dc(ip) as ip_addresses dc(globalCallID_callManagerId) as call_managers dc(globalCallId_ClusterID) as clusters

module.name: Search
module.param: | tstats prestats=t count WHERE `custom_index` GROUPBY origIpAddr, destIpAddr, origDeviceName, destDeviceName, globalCallID_callId, globalCallID_callManagerId, globalCallId_ClusterID, _time span=1d | stats count by origIpAddr, destIpAddr, origDeviceName, destDeviceName, globalCallID_callId, globalCallID_callManagerId, globalCallId_ClusterID, _time | eval globalCallID_callManagerId=globalCallId_ClusterID + "::" + globalCallID_callManagerId | `get_call_id` | eval ip=mvappend(origIpAddr,destIpAddr) | eval device=mvappend(origDeviceName,destDeviceName) | eval day=_time | bin day span=1d | eval day_of_week=lower(strftime(day,"%A")) | stats earliest(_time) as earliest latest(_time) as latest dc(call_id) as calls dc(device) as devices dc(ip) as ip_addresses dc(globalCallID_callManagerId) as call_managers dc(globalCallId_ClusterID) as clusters by day day_of_week | eval hours_of_data=(latest-earliest)/3600 | eval time=strftime(day,"%m/%d/%Y (%A)") | fields time clusters call_managers devices ip_addresses calls hours_of_data

module.name: Search
module.param:
| inputlookup clusters | stats count | rename count as clusters | appendcols [ | inputlookup groups | stats count as extensions] | appendcols [ | inputlookup groups | stats dc(group) as groups] | appendcols [ | inputlookup cidr | stats count as "subnets (via sites)"] | appendcols [ | inputlookup cidr | stats dc(site_name) as sites ] | appendcols [ | inputlookup devices | stats count as "devices"] | appendcols [ | inputlookup devices | stats dc(devicePool) as "devicePools (via devices)"]
| fields clusters sites subnets* extensions devices devicePools* custom* *

module.name: HTML
module.param: For more detail consult the "Lookup Summary" section on the app's landing page. Also the administration pages for these lookups can be found in the app navigation above, under "App Settings".

module.name: Search
module.param: | rest /servicesNS/$sideview.currentUser$/cisco_cdr/data/transforms/extractions splunk_server=local | rename eai:acl.owner as owner | search title=cisco-cdr-* FORMAT=*device_type::* disabled=0 | rex field=FORMAT "device_type::(?<device_type>[^\s]+)" | fields device_type title owner FORMAT REGEX SOURCE_KEY | stats count values(*) as * by device_type | search device_type!="gateway" | eval actions="replaced at runtime" | eval type=if(owner=="nobody","app", "custom") | search type=="custom" | stats count as "custom device types" | appendcols [| rest /servicesNS/millicent/cisco_cdr/saved/eventtypes | search title="leg_type_*" | eval type=if(owner=="nobody","app", "custom") | search type="custom" | stats count as "leg types" ]
